leadText: Route 5 (Japanese: ５番道路 Route 5) is a route in central Kalos, connecting Lumiose City and Camphrier Town. The route is also known as Versant Road (Japanese: ベルサン通り Versant Road).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Youngster Keita asks the player before battle if they want to know why he wears shorts when he walks in the tall grass . After being defeated, his answer is " Because they're comfy and easy to wear! ", a reference to Youngster Ben from Route 3 in Kanto . In addition, Youngster Keita's Japanese name, Mamoru, is a reference to Mamoru Miyano , the Japanese voice actor of Cilan in Pokémon the Series , who, like Keita, uses a Pansage . Name origin [ edit | edit source ] Versant is French for slope.
